use_cases: Display user profile pictures in dashboards and settings pages
Show author avatars alongside blog posts and articles
Render team member images in organizational charts
Display customer avatars in comments and reviews sections
Show participant thumbnails in video conferencing interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built on Radix UI primitives that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. Features a rounded-full design with configurable sizing and styling. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, social platforms, and any application requiring user identity representation.
